ab: Awi, ni ku cmhungi madis ppatis, kbrexi ku tikuh nisu han ho?
ch: W:Awi，我忘了帶筆，你可以借我嗎?
en: Sudu, I forgot to bring my pen. Can you lend me one?

ab: Uka ku yaku duri, na Padiq ka ni mu dooyun duri wa!
ch: M:我也沒有，我拿的這支也是Padiq的喔!

ab: Muwa kbrexun saku tikuh? Maha sumu asi prihi naq saya.
ch: W:那可以借我一下子嗎?我很快就還你。
en: Can you lend me the pen for a second? I will return to you immediately.

ab: Un, ngali.
en: Sure, take it.

ab: Mhuwe su bale, mhuwe su bale kesa ka Padiq duri.
en: Thank you and thank Padiq for me.

ab: Maanu nana wa?
en: May I help you?

ab: Daha patis nii.
en: I want to return these two books.

ab: Un, maanu nana?
en: No problem and what else do you need?

ab: Pkbarux ku teru patis nii duri.
en: I would like to borrow these three books.

ab: Un, hadi hini da bobo mkteru ali.
ch: W:好了，記得三天後要拿來還。
en: Sure and remember to return them after three days.

ab: Ini saku hadi hini ka serus nana.
en: You haven’t returned me the eraser.

ab: Wada sumu hadun ciga da hayan.
en: I returned it yesterday.

ab: Ma wada uka ka serus mu duri di?
ch: M:那我的橡皮擦怎麼不見了？
en: Then, why is my eraser missing?

ab: Uxe su wada skbarux Awi di peni!
en: Did you lend it to Awi?

ab: Ini mu klai wa. Hae mu smiling hayan.
en: I don’t know. I will go and ask her.

ab: Ngali naku nii hayan peni.
en: I will lend you my eraser first.

ab: Padiq, knbrexan suna Awi ka lukus pbabo nii?
en: Padiq, did Awi lend you this coat?

ab: Uxe, bnaruy kuna bubu mu ka nii.
ch: W:不是，這是我媽媽買給我的。
en: No, my mom bought it for me.

ab: Mntena bale ka lukus pbabo namu yamu ka Awi.
en: Awi’s coat is the same as yours.

ab: Qalux lukus pbabo na ka heya. Ini pntena ka rako nami.
ch: W:他的外套是黑色的，我們的顏色不一樣。
en: His coat is black, so our colors are different.

ab: Padiq, ye su knbarux pila na Awi ka isu ha?
en: ,Padiq did you borrow money from Awi?

ab: Kiya ma, naka mu bale prihun saya, ni ku cmhungi madis pila da.
ch: W:有，我本來今天要還他，我忘記帶錢了。
en: Yes, I was supposed to return to him today, but I forgot to bring the money.

ab: So kiya de, prrihun su knuwan denu?
en: Then, when will you return the money?

ab: Kusun.
en: tomorrow.

ab: Oo, sae sumu mrengo Awi denu.
en: Okay, I will tell Awi for you.
